name: @kealee/pascal-wrapper
description: Pascal Editor integration layer — visual spatial design, floor plan editing, and AI-assisted preconstruction for Kealee

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --external react --external react-dom --external three --external @react-three/fiber --external @react-three/drei
scripts.dev: tsup src/index.ts --format cjs,esm --dts --watch --external react --external react-dom --external three --external @react-three/fiber --external @react-three/drei
